text:
I'll search for this historical reference by Condorcet.
The web search results confirm the existence of this historical reference with complete clarity. Multiple authoritative sources provide dedicated pages for this work:


The Gallica database of the Bibliothèque Nationale de France has the exact title "Essai sur l'application de l'analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix" by M. le marquis de Condorcet from 1785
, and 
AbeBooks confirms the author as "Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas Caritat, Marquis de" and lists the publisher as "De l'Imprimerie Royale" with date 1785
.


The essay was first published in 1785
, and 
the e-rara digital library entry shows the full author name as "M. le marquis [Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas Caritat] de Condorcet"
. The title, author, publisher venue, and year all match the reference provided.

EXPLANATION: The exact paper with matching title, author name (in full form Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas de Caritat, Marquis de Condorcet), publisher (L'Imprimerie Royale), and year (1785) is confirmed in multiple academic and library databases.
LINK: https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k417181.image
FOUND_TITLE: Essai sur l'application de l'analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas de Caritat, Marquis de Condorcet
FOUND_YEAR: 1785
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
